properties.name: 4411 Nelson Dr
properties.address_full: 4411 Nelson Dr, St. Louis, MO 63121, USA
properties.marketing_message:
Welcome home to 4411 Nelson Dr, a beautifully updated 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom home in the desirable St. Louis area! This spacious 1530 sq ft residence offers comfortable living with features like central AC, stunning hardwood floors, and a convenient layout. Enjoy the benefits of a full, unfinished walk-out basement, perfect for storage or potential customization. Parking is easy with off-street spaces and a convenient tuck-under garage.

Inside, find modern amenities including a dishwasher, pantry, and stove & oven. Laundry hookups are readily available for your convenience. This move-in-ready home is close to everything, making errands and commuting a breeze.

Located in the Normandy Schools Collaborative school district, this home is ideal for families seeking a great place to live long-term. Pets are welcome with a pet fee and additional pet rent. Schedule your showing today!

This updated and move-in-ready 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home offers comfortable living in a fantastic location within the Ferguson-Florissant School District. Enjoy 984 square feet of well-designed living space, featuring a full, partially finished basement perfect for a variety of uses. You'll love the convenience of central AC, a fully equipped kitchen with a dishwasher, refrigerator, and stove/oven, and the ease of tile floors throughout.

This home boasts a large backyard ideal for relaxing or entertaining, plus off-street parking and an attached garage. Laundry hookups, a pantry, and washer/dryer hookups add to the convenience. Located close to shopping, dining and major highways, everything you need is within easy reach. Small pets are welcome with a pet fee and monthly pet rent. Don’t miss this opportunity to live in a great space in a desirable community! Contact us today to schedule a viewing!
